\tzpentry{ID3453}{Gyromagnetic Quantum State Parametrization}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3453 introduces Gyromagnetic Quantum State Parametrization as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi(t) = \begin{pmatrix} \vec{r}_{\text{cm}}(t) \\ \vec{p}_{\text{cm}}(t) \\ g(t) \\ \vec{L}_{\text{gyro}}(t) \\ \vec{\mu}_{\text{eff}}(t) \\ \vec{A}(\vec{r}_{\text{obs}}, t) \end{pmatrix} \in \mathbb{R}^{18} \end{equation}
